name: KRONOS WORLDWIDE INC
summary: Kronos Worldwide, Inc. is a leading global producer and marketer of titanium dioxide (TiO2) pigments, selling over 30 grades under the KRONOS trademark to approximately 3,000 customers in 100 countries. Products serve coatings, plastics, paper, inks, cosmetics, and pharmaceuticals markets. The company also operates an ilmenite mine in Norway and manufactures iron-based and specialty chemicals as complementary businesses, with primary markets in Europe and North America.

products.name: Chloride Process TiO2 Pigments
products.description: Rutile TiO2 produced via chloride process, preferred for coatings and plastics applications.

products.name: Sulfate Process TiO2 Pigments
products.description: Rutile and anatase TiO2 produced via sulfate process, preferred for paper, cosmetics, and pharmaceuticals.

products.name: Ilmenite Ore
products.description: Raw material mined in Norway, sold to internal sulfate plants and third-party competitors.

products.name: Iron-Based Chemicals (Ecochem)
products.description: Co-products of TiO2 production used in wastewater treatment, iron pigments, cement, and agriculture.

products.name: Specialty Chemicals
products.description: Side-stream TiO2 production products used in pearlescent pigments, electroceramic capacitors, and natural gas pipe applications.

partnerships.description: Former 50/50 joint venture partner in Louisiana Pigment Company (LPC), a chloride-process TiO2 plant near Lake Charles, Louisiana.
